landing.tagline: Find your coach and take your performance to the next level.
landing.heroLine1: Find the coach that trains you how you deserve.
landing.heroLine2: CrossFit, bodybuilding, women-specific, rehab, and more — book someone who gets your goals.
landing.feat1Sub: See coaches who cover your area.

coach.restDay: Rest day — leave empty or add blocks.
coach.importIntro: Upload a Word, Excel, or PDF document — we'll turn it into a structured program and attach YouTube demo searches to every movement. You can edit it after.
coach.leadsHint: Inquiries that came in through your private intake form.
coach.shareThisLink: Share this link on social media
coach.shareHint: Add ?source=instagram or ?source=whatsapp to track where each lead came from.
coach.noLeadsYet: No inquiries yet. Share your link to start collecting leads.
coach.regenSuccess: Program rebuilt from your source document.
coach.importDisabledBody: AI program import is paused. Build programs manually from each athlete's profile — open an athlete → New program → add weeks, days, blocks, and movements.
coach.programCreatedHint: You'll see it in the list below with a NEW tag. Open it to review weeks, days and movements — every exercise has a YouTube search link attached.
coach.pastePlaceholder: Paste the program here — from Notes, WhatsApp, email, anywhere. Claude will structure it.
coach.editListingHint: This is what athletes see when browsing coaches.
coach.headline: Headline
coach.serviceArea: Service area (click the map to set your home base)
coach.locationInstruction: Click anywhere on the map to set where you're based. Drag the radius slider to show how far you'll travel.

athlete.notLinked: You're not yet linked to a coach. Browse the directory to find one.

directory.leadFormTagline: Answer a few questions and we'll recommend matching coaches.
directory.contactPlaceholder: Tell this coach what you're looking for...
directory.noMapLocations: No coaches have set their location on the map yet. Browse the list or check back soon.
directory.contactHint: At least one is required. We'll only share with the coaches we match you with.
directory.consent: I agree to be contacted about coaching and receive occasional updates.
directory.privacyNote: Your details only go to the coaches we match you with. You can unsubscribe any time.
directory.thanksTitle: Got it — we'll be in touch.
directory.thanksBody: We've shared your answers with the best-fit coaches. Expect a message within 24h. In the meantime you can browse profiles.
directory.needContact: Add at least one way to contact you (email, phone, or Instagram).
directory.jorgeIntakeTagline: Tell me a bit about you and your goals — I'll personally get back to you.
directory.jorgeThanks: Your answers reached me directly. I'll reply within 24h to schedule a first session.
directory.contactHintJorge: At least one way is required.

leadForm.frequencyCurrent: How much do you train now?
leadForm.frequencyDesired: How often do you want to train?
leadForm.preferredLocation: Where do you want to train?
leadForm.urgency: When do you want to start?
leadForm.thanksSub: We'll match you with coaches that fit. In the meantime, start browsing.

account.title: Account
account.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
account.deleteWarning: This permanently removes your account and all associated data. Cannot be undone.
